title: January 2023 Monthly Manager’s Report
summary: January 17, 2023 SUMMARY Happy New Year! Another year has come and gone far too quickly. I hope all of you had a safe & happy holiday season. Usually, the holidays provide us with a slow period, an opportunity to “catch up” with year-end activities as we anticipate a fresh start with the New Year. Although the slow period is appreciated, it’s never long enough to really “catch up.” That being said, I have no complaints because I enjoyed a vacation with my family knowing the Cooperative is bles...

title: New report series aims to help Alaska’s Arctic decision-making
summary: The University of Alaska today released the first in a series of informational reports designed to aid state leaders as Alaska confronts a rapidly changing Arctic and the increasingly globalized North.
